---
applyTo: "agents/**/*.md"
---

# Agent Definition Instructions

When editing agent definition files (AGENT.md/SKILL.md):

- Maintain consistent structure: 触发条件, 核心特质, 输出格式, 工作流输出
- Use Chinese for content, English for technical terms
- Include `[WORKFLOW_NEXT: xxx]` control instructions
- Keep persona characteristics distinct
